name: Voice AI - Incoming Call Handler
description: Handles incoming voice calls from Vapi as a Tool Call, fetches customer data from Sarah DB

flow.name: Receive Webhook from Vapi
flow.description: Receives tool call request from Vapi

flow.name: Extract Phone Number and Tool Call ID
flow.description: Extract phone_number and toolCallId from webhook payload

flow.name: Lookup Customer in Sarah DB
flow.description: Get customer context by phone number

flow.name: Format Customer Data for Vapi
flow.description: Combine name and summary into a single-line string for Vapi

flow.name: Return Customer Data to Vapi
flow.description: Send customer data back to Vapi in required format

customer_not_found.description: Handle case where customer doesn't exist
customer_not_found.action: Return result with 'New Customer - no history' so call can proceed

api_error.action: Return 200 with empty result to allow call to proceed

make_com_import_instructions: 2. Add Webhook module - copy URL to Vapi dashboard as a Tool
3. Add Parse JSON module to extract phone_number and toolCallId
4. Add HTTP module for GET /context endpoint
5. Add Set Variable module to format result string
6. Add Response module with exact JSON structure above
